text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, when visiting the library to return some
reference materials I've borrowed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Have you some business to attend to
here as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I've come to peruse some history books. Few
people know this, but this library actually houses
an extensive collection on history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I often come here in my free time to make use of
it.
choice_data_list:
Right, I remember that you're into history
books.

Right, I remember that you're into history
books.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. ...They're absolutely captivating.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Within these pages lie the endeavors of those of
the past, remaining forever for us in the present
to pore over. That fact alone makes me tingle
with excitement...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
By peering into the lives of the people who lived
before us and contemplating how the historians
who recorded them must have felt, I feel a surge
of emotion from my own world expanding.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Every time I immerse myself in one of these
books, I feel myself hoping to live my own life
with such sincerity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I feel that I gain something akin to... a courage
needed to fulfill the moments I have.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Detecting a hint of excitement in Mejiro Ardan's
voice, I find myself wanting to experience the
sensation she's describing...
choice_data_list: I'm thinking of reading a history book myself.
I'm thinking of reading a history book myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my! You truly want to?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Well, um, in that case, if it's all right with you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please allow me to assist you with your search for
a book to read.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Not at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So then, have you ever wanted to read a
particular sort of history book? I'd like to make as
informed a recommendation as I possibly can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing Mejiro Ardan, I've got no doubt that she
knows the genre in and out. I should see what she
recommends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'd like to read a history book that is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Full of tumultuous events... Then perhaps one
that recounts the rise and fall of an empire would
be to your liking?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As people are faced with the potential collapse of
their very civilization, their myriad decisions
make waves upon history and result in a great
deal of tumult.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I have a fair few good reads in mind. Shall we
take a look at them?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, Mejiro Ardan gives me her
handpicked recommendation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words echo through my mind as I read
through the history book she chose, and I get a
glimpse into the sorts of things she holds dear...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Approachable for beginners... Then perhaps one
that focuses on a specific historical figure would
be to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Historical events of their lifetime are relayed from
their perspective, much in the same way that a
novel's story is told through the eyes of its
characters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I have a fair few good reads in mind. Shall we
take a look at them?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, Mejiro Ardan gives me her
handpicked recommendation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words echo through my mind as I read
through the history book she chose, and I get a
glimpse into the sorts of things she holds dear...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: A book that I like! Well, I'd be perfectly happy to recommend one of those, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder what I should do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is highly embarrassing, but um... I simply
have so many favorites that I can't narrow the
selection down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I haven't had many opportunities like this to
recommend history books either...
choice_data_list:
Why don't you tell me what you like about all
your favorite books?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. Then I shall do precisely that—in
great detail, and to the best of my ability!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, as I watch Mejiro Ardan's history book
presentation unfold...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get a glimpse into the sorts of things she holds
dear from the way she talks so excitedly about
her favorite history books...
